scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const f of ['package-lock.json','yarn.lock']) fs.rmSync(f,{force:true});"
scripts.setup:windows: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const p of ['node_modules']) fs.rmSync(p,{recursive:true,force:true}); for (const f of ['pnpm-lock.yaml','package-lock.json','yarn.lock']) fs.rmSync(f,{force:true}); console.log('Removed stale install and lockfile. Now run: pnpm install');"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
